title: Quark VRO - Oaken Chests
description: Chests from Quark now on Vanilla
body:
![A normal chest with the resource pack installed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58036976903a43c7c77b81d9ab3636ec54d58335.png)

**[Quark VRO](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quark-vro)** doesn't touch the vanilla chests at all by default. Players, however, might want their normal chests to look like the Oak Chests from the **[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)** mod, especially in their vanilla playthroughs. Oaken Chests is an addon pack meant to be played together with the regular Quark VRO (above, in the resource pack order).

_This an addon for the main pack, for entirety of Quark VRO go [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quark-vro)._

_For any issues with the pack or feature requests, go [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/oaken-chests/issues)._


_All credits go to the original Quark creators, especially Endergy, creator of the chest textures._

_Permission from Vazkii, Quark's creator, to create this resource pack is in Quark VRO's Gallery section._

### [Join Violet Moon's Discord!](https://discord.gg/vm)
